基础画质 (Basic Quality).通用画质修复: lowres, bad anatomy, bad hands, text, error, missing fingers, extra digit, fewer digits, cropped, worst quality, low quality, normal quality, jpeg artifacts, signature, watermark, username, blurry

肢体修复 (Anatomy).坏手: bad hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, too many fingers, malformed limbs
肢体修复 (Anatomy).多余肢体: extra arms, extra legs, extra limb

脸部修复 (Face).坏脸: poorly drawn face, disfigured face, bad eyes
